title: Fusion Project Timeline Comparison
executive_question: Which fusion projects are on track to achieve net energy gain and commercial operation by 2035?
comparison_set: ITER, SPARC (Commonwealth Fusion Systems), STEP (UKAEA), TAE Technologies, General Fusion, Helion Energy, Zap Energy
preferred_sources: ITER Organization official updates
Commonwealth Fusion Systems press releases
UKAEA STEP programme reports
Fusion Industry Association annual reports
DOE Fusion Energy Sciences advisory committee presentations
search_queries: ITER project status 2025 first plasma date
data_quality_rule: Only include projects with publicly announced milestones from official sources or reputable media. If a milestone date is not confirmed, note as 'TBD' and source the latest estimate.

title: Projected LCOE of Fusion vs. Alternatives
executive_question: At what point does fusion become cost-competitive with solar, wind, and nuclear fission?
required_metrics: solar PV LCOE ($/MWh) for same years
onshore wind LCOE ($/MWh) for same years
nuclear fission LCOE ($/MWh) for same years
natural gas combined cycle LCOE ($/MWh) for same years
comparison_set: Fusion (range from multiple studies), solar PV, onshore wind, nuclear fission, natural gas
preferred_sources: Lazard Levelized Cost of Energy Analysis (annual)
IEA World Energy Outlook
DOE Fusion Energy LCOE studies
Fusion Industry Association cost reports
National Renewable Energy Laboratory (NREL) ATB
search_queries: IEA World Energy Outlook 2024 LCOE projections
data_quality_rule: Use only published LCOE estimates from authoritative sources. For fusion, include a range (low-high) from multiple studies. If no official projection exists for a given year, leave blank and note as 'no data'.

title: Global Fusion Investment by Source
executive_question: How much capital is flowing into fusion, and from which sectors?
required_metrics: private investment by region (North America, Europe, Asia, Rest of World) ($M)
comparison_set: Annual investment from 2020 to 2025, split by public vs. private and by region
preferred_sources: Fusion Industry Association annual investment reports
BloombergNEF fusion investment data
Crunchbase/ PitchBook fusion startup funding rounds
DOE Office of Science fusion budget requests
European Commission Horizon Europe fusion funding
data_quality_rule: Use only aggregated data from industry reports or official budgets. For private investment, cross-check with multiple sources (e.g., FIA and BloombergNEF). If regional breakdown is unavailable, note as 'not disclosed'.

title: Strategic Positioning of Major Energy Companies
executive_question: Which oil & gas, utility, and tech firms are investing in fusion, and what are their motivations?
required_metrics: stated strategic rationale (decarbonization, diversification, technology hedge, other)
comparison_set: Major energy companies (e.g., Eni, Chevron, Equinor, Shell, EDF, NextEra, Google, Microsoft, Bill Gates) and their fusion investments
preferred_sources: Company annual reports and investor presentations
Press releases announcing fusion investments
Fusion Industry Association corporate member lists
SEC filings for public companies
Reuters, Financial Times articles on corporate fusion deals
search_queries: Eni fusion investment Commonwealth Fusion Systems
data_quality_rule: Only include investments confirmed by official company announcements or credible financial news. Investment amounts must be publicly disclosed; if undisclosed, note as 'undisclosed'. Strategic rationale should be quoted from official statements.

title: Regulatory and Licensing Milestones for Fusion
executive_question: What are the key regulatory and licensing milestones that will govern fusion commercialization?
required_metrics: milestone (e.g., draft regulation, public consultation, final rule, first license application, first license approval)
comparison_set: United States (NRC), United Kingdom (UKAEA/ONR), Canada (CNSC), European Union (Euratom/EC), Japan (JAEA), China (CAEA)
preferred_sources: US Nuclear Regulatory Commission fusion rulemaking docket
UK Department for Energy Security and Net Zero fusion policy papers
Canadian Nuclear Safety Commission fusion regulatory framework
European Commission fusion regulation documents
International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) fusion safety reports
data_quality_rule: Use only official regulatory documents and government publications. Dates must be from official schedules or announcements. If a milestone is not yet scheduled, note as 'not yet defined'.
